subject: Swift-BAT trigger 430975 is not a burst
body:
S. D. Barthelmy (GSFC) for the Swift-BAT team:
 
Using the data set from T-60 to T+243 sec from recent telemetry downlinks,
we report that BAT trigger #430975 is not a GRB, nor is it astrophysical.
It is likely due to a chance coincidence of fluctuations in the rate and
image domains.
